summary: iteration_8 (Prompts + Telnyx + WA rules + Regression) tested. Backend: 15/16 pytest pass (the LLM-generated Sofía script is missing the 'antifluido' keyword the meta-prompt demands — quality issue, not a crash). Dropi regression 5/5 pass, products.match promo detection pass. Frontend: /app/prompts, /app/connectors, /app/messages, and funnel landing all render with every required data-testid.

minor.issue: LLM output does NOT contain the required token 'antifluido' — meta-prompt says 'SIEMPRE antifluido — NUNCA impermeable' but the model (returned 200) omitted it entirely. Meta-prompt may need stronger constraint or a post-generation validation/repair loop. Currently returns a first-message-style short paragraph instead of the FULL LIT-LOG-RO system prompt requested.

issues: prompt-preview-system renders the raw system_prompt but does not substitute example variable values in the visible sample text (e.g. no 'María'/'Servientrega'/'Medellín' seen). Not blocking but the spec asked for live rendered preview with example values.

action_items: Strengthen /api/prompts/generate meta-prompt or add post-validation so the returned system_prompt always contains 'antifluido' (never 'impermeable') and covers the full LIT-LOG-RO flow, not just the opener.
Optional: make /app/prompts preview substitute example vars (María/Servientrega/Medellín/…) so operators see the rendered result at a glance.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/prompts.py: generate() has no server-side guardrail that verifies the LLM output contains 'antifluido' and excludes 'impermeable'. Given this is a NO-NEGOTIABLE brand rule, add a validation pass + retry (or automatic string replace + repair prompt).
routes/whatsapp.py resolve_rule_for_days_left(): days_left > days_max (e.g. 999) returns no rule. If 'no_oficina' should catch everything ≥4, extend seed to days_max=9999 or add a fallback.
seed_data_creation: Created & then deleted TEST_Sofia Servientrega campaign prompt during CRUD test. Telnyx env intentionally empty (expected).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_8 verified: Prompts CRUD+resolve (campaign>global scoring works), Telnyx config masked + register 400 guard-rail, WA rules CRUD+resolve, WA templates proxy (returns configured=true with 10 templates because CHATEA_PRO_API_KEY IS set in .env — spec said 'if empty return empty'; it's set, so we got 10 templates). Frontend: all data-testids present on /app/prompts, /app/connectors, /app/messages, funnel landing. Only real issue: /api/prompts/generate doesn't enforce 'antifluido' in output.
rca of the issue: TestPrompts.test_generate_prompt failure — RCA: The meta prompt in routes/prompts.py GENERATE_META contains 'SIEMPRE decir antifluido — NUNCA impermeable' but the LLM (Groq default) returned only an opener paragraph, dropping the antifluido keyword and the full 6-step flow. This is a model-compliance issue. Mitigation: (a) increase temperature=0 / add JSON-schema constraint, (b) after LLM call verify output contains 'antifluido' and does NOT contain 'impermeable'; if it fails, run one repair prompt or fallback to seeded CO prompt, (c) also assert output length > 500 chars to make sure the full LIT-LOG-RO script was authored.
